label.purpose: Table header, metric label, chip — 10px, 700 weight, uppercase, 0.08em tracking.

mono.purpose: Timestamps, token count, duration, correlation ID — 12px monospace.

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Primary KPI display — large value, label, foot note. Corner radius 10px, border 1px, hover shadow-sm.
components.html:
TOTAL REQUEST
1.284
60 menit terakhir
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dde1e9; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px 18px; transition: box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease; } .ds-metric-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06); border-color: #bcc3ce; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 34px; font-weight: 800; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1; color: #111827; margin-top: 5px; } .ds-metric-foot { color: #6b7280; font-size: 11px; margin-top: 5px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-metric-card[data-accent="primary"] { border-top: 3px solid #2454d6; } .ds-metric-card[data-accent="red"] { border-top: 3px solid #b91c1c; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Inline status indicator. Pill shape, 11px bold. Semantic color variants.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 9px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; background: #f8f9fb; border: 1px solid #dde1e9; color: #6b7280; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-ok { background: #edf7f0; border-color: rgba(21,128,61,0.4); color: #15803d; } .ds-chip-warn { background: #fefce8; border-color: rgba(161,98,7,0.4); color: #a16207; } .ds-chip-err { background: #fef2f2; border-color: rgba(185,28,28,0.4); color: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Table status badge. Pill, 10px 800 weight. Three semantic variants.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 20px; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.03em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-ok { background: #edf7f0; color: #15803d; } .ds-badge-err { background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; } .ds-badge-warn { background: #fefce8; color: #a16207; } .ds-badge-type { background: #eef2ff; color: #2454d6; }

components.name: Data Table Cell
components.description: Table with alternating rows, sticky header, mono numeric cells.
components.html:
WAKTUINPUTOUTPUTDURASISTATUS
10 Jul 14:323.2008924.2 dtkOK
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 800px; } .ds-table th { text-align: left; padding: 10px 12px; background: #f8f9fb; color: #6b7280; border-bottom: 1px solid #dde1e9; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1; } .ds-table td { padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #dde1e9; color: #111827; font-size: 13px; } .ds-table td.ds-num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-family: "Cascadia Code", "Cascadia Mono", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; text-align: right; } .ds-table td.ds-mono { font-family: "Cascadia Code", "Cascadia Mono", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; } .ds-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) td { background: color-mix(in srgb, #f8f9fb 45%, #fff); } .ds-table tbody tr:hover td { background: rgba(91,141,245,0.08); }

components.name: Auth Overlay
components.description: Login gate for admin pages. Centered card, password input, primary button.
components.css: #auth-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 1000; background: #f0f2f5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-auth-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dde1e9; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(15,23,42,0.1); padding: 36px 40px; width: 380px; max-width: 95vw; text-align: center; } .ds-lock-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px; background: #eef2ff; color: #2454d6; display: grid; place-items: center; margin: 0 auto 20px; font-size: 22px; } .ds-auth-card input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #dde1e9; border-radius: 6px; background: #f8f9fb; color: #111827; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 12px; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-auth-card input:focus { border-color: #2454d6; outline: none; } .ds-auth-card button { width: 100%; height: 38px; background: #2454d6; border: none; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 10px; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-auth-card button:hover { opacity: 0.88; }

components.name: Chart Panel
components.description: Chart.js container panel. Header, summary strip, canvas area.
components.html:
Request dan waktu tunggu

Total request128
components.css: .ds-chart-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dde1e9; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06); overflow: hidden; } .ds-chart-panel:hover { border-color: #bcc3ce; } .ds-panel-header { padding: 14px 18px 0; } .ds-panel-header h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-chart-summary { margin: 12px 18px 0; padding: 10px 0; display: flex; gap: 0; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; border-top: 1px solid #dde1e9; border-bottom: 1px solid #dde1e9; } .ds-chart-summary-item { min-width: 135px; padding: 2px 18px 2px 0; margin-right: 18px; border-right: 1px solid #dde1e9; } .ds-chart-summary-item:last-child { border-right: 0; margin-right: 0; } .ds-chart-summary-item span { display: block; color: #6b7280; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-chart-summary-item strong { display: block; font-size: 14px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-chart-wrap { position: relative; height: 230px; padding: 12px 16px 14px; }

narrative.overview: JIFAS Operations Console adalah instrument panel enterprise-grade untuk monitoring chatbot AI dan administrasi. Setiap elemen visual ada karena data membutuhkannya — chrome nol, noise nol, signal maksimal. Color-as-signal bukan decoration. Shadow is interaction signal. Flat at rest. Numbers first, chrome never.
keyCharacteristics: Color-as-signal, bukan decoration. Warna carry information bukan atmosphere.
Information hierarchy absolute — metric paling penting di atas, detail di bawah.
Zero-click insight — ringkasan kondisi langsung visible tanpa interaksi.
Dense but breathable — banyak data, cukup spacing untuk scan cepat.
Flat at rest. Shadows only on hover. Interaction is intentional.

rules.name: The Signal Doctrine
rules.body: Warna hanya muncul di tiga konteks: status (OK/err/warn), interactive (button, link, focus), dan semantic (cache=cyan). Tidak ada fourth use case.

rules.name: The Muted Ceiling
rules.body: --muted tidak pernah turun dari #6b7280 untuk body text. Light grey untuk elegance adalah anti-pattern.

rules.name: The Mono for Data Rule
rules.body: Semua field numerik yang bukan metric card (timestamp, token count, duration) wajib menggunakan font mono.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Semua surface flat saat render. Shadow hanya muncul pada hover atau elevation change.

dos: Do use color exclusively for status signal. Blue = interactive. Green = OK. Red = error. Amber = warning. Cyan = cache.
Do use tabular-nums pada semua metric value dan monospace cells.
Do keep metric values large and bold (34px display) — angka harus bisa dibaca dari 2 meter.
Do use right-align for numeric table columns.
donts: Don't use --muted below #6b7280 for body text. Light grey for elegance fails WCAG 4.5:1.
Don't use decorative shadow. Shadow is only for hover response and overlay.
Don't use gradient backgrounds anywhere. Surface is solid.
Don't use gradient text. Single solid color for all headings.
Don't use glassmorphism. Backdrop blur is not used.
Don't use emoji in data labels. Status should be conveyed through color/badge.
Don't use tooltip untuk informasi kritis. Semua data harus visible tanpa hover.
Don't mix font families. Segoe UI everywhere, mono for data.
